channel.title: The Impact Logic Podcast
channel.description: A series of talks discussing about the hidden areas of an traffic accident claim: EDR, Total Loss Valuation and Appraisal Clause, and Diminished Value. Hosts by Huy Vu, Lead Specialist of Impact Logic Appraisal and EDR.

item.title: Episode 1: The Diminished Value talk
item.description: In our inaugural episode, we discuss the one thing that most ESL claimants overlook, why is the insurance company is gatekeeping this, and how to make the most of it.
